name: python3-requests-file
title: python3-requests-file
summary: File transport adapter for Requests - Python 3.X
description:
File transport adapter for Requests - Python 3.X
Requests-File is a transport adapter for use with the Requests Python
library to allow local filesystem access via file:// URLs.
.
Features:
.
* Will open and read local files
* Might set a Content-Length header
* That's about it
.
No encoding information is set in the response object, so be careful using
Response.text: the chardet library will be used to convert the file to a
unicode type and it may not detect what you actually want.
.
EACCES is converted to a 403 status code, and ENOENT is converted to a
404. All other IOError types are converted to a 400.
.
This package contains the Python 3 version of the library.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-requests-file because File transport adapter for Requests - Python 3.X.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-requests-file as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-requests-file with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-requests-file --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
